meta.title: Aman Bhatt · ML Engineer & Data Scientist
meta.description: Aman Bhatt — ML Engineer & Data Scientist. Energy forecasting, LLMs, MLOps.

hero.availability: Senior Machine Learning Engineer · BSES Rajdhani Power Limited
hero.bio: ML Engineer turning energy data into decisions — forecasting, real-time pipelines and LLM assistants.

about.label: About me
paragraphs: Data enthusiast and a proficient data scientist with a background in civil engineering. Currently working as an Assistant Manager – Data Science & AI at BSES Rajdhani Power Limited, applying advanced algorithms and techniques to solve complex forecasting problems.

Passionate about leveraging data-driven insights and building AI systems that last — driving measurable business impact across the energy sector. Experienced in bridging research with engineering, enabling grid operators and renewable energy firms to make data-driven decisions at speed.

skills.label: Tech stack
skills.heading: Skills & Tools
skills.sub: From raw data to deployed model — the full ML engineering toolkit.

experience.label: Experience
experience.heading: Work Experience
experience.sub: Building real ML systems in the energy sector.

bullets: Own end-to-end demand forecasting for Delhi's electricity grid — day ahead, intraday, and week-ahead — at <3% MAPE, replacing a manual process that ran at 5–6%; segment-based ensembles (LightGBM, CatBoost, XGBoost) across weekday, weekend, and holiday regimes with real-time SCADA correction, Optuna tuning, and MLflow tracking.

Architected two production RAG systems on Llama 3.3 70B (ChromaDB, FastAPI, cross-encoder reranking): a forecasting assistant for grid operations, and a company-wide knowledge base over technical documentation and operational standards.
Built supporting data infrastructure — a FastAPI weather ingestion microservice across 14 geographic centroids feeding the forecast pipeline.

Built demand forecasting systems for three Delhi DISCOMs (BRPL, BYPL, TPDDL) from the ground up — segment-based ensembles (Neural Networks, LightGBM, CatBoost, XGBoost) across day-ahead and intraday horizons.
Designed solar and wind forecasting across 166 plants for REMC Telangana; week-ahead predictions deployed on AWS SageMaker with automated CI/CD and model versioning.
Built electricity price forecasting models for IEX at 7.5% MAPE using LightGBM on market microstructure data.
Designed structural foundations for oil refinery equipment using AutoCAD, StaadPro, and RISA Base.
